title: Concealment of Financial Assets
description: Evidence demonstrating undisclosed financial transfers occurring directly prior to the separation date.
legalMemo:
## Tactical Synthesis: Financial Concealment

Based on timeline analysis, there is a clear pattern of shifting marital funds bypassing joint accounts. The attached evidentiary nodes confirm transactions initiated without mutual consent, establishing grounds for a full financial audit request during discovery.

title: Violations of Temporary Parenting Plan
description: Communications and logs showing unilateral deviations from the mediated custody schedule.
legalMemo:
## Tactical Synthesis: Custody Schedule

Preliminary analysis reveals multiple instances where agreed-upon transition windows were ignored. Further SMS timeline harvesting is recommended to cement this argument.
